rationale: The implementation faithfully matches frozen v12 Task 1. The package is private ESM, requires Node >=18, and omits both dependency fields. check.mjs recursively discovers all .mjs files under clotho/, normalizes and sorts their relative paths in POSIX form, and invokes process.execPath with --check through execFileSync without a shell. test-all.mjs has an explicit ordered registry, detects unlisted test-*.mjs files recursively while correctly excluding the runner itself, and executes every listed test in a fresh Node process. npm test runs check before test-all, and the scaffold test prints exactly "clotho scaffold OK". The supplied diff boundary is confined to the four authorized clotho files plus the required .telos/clotho/ addition to .gitignore; workflows, spine code, and existing packages remain untouched. The added package metadata and explanatory comments do not introduce functionality or expand scope. The deterministic gate also reports all 10 checks passing with no surviving blockers.
